beats.action: Lyra stands near Valerius's crumpled body, looking desperately at Kaelen off-screen, the midday heat shimmering around them.
beats.camera: wide shot, slow pan from Valerius's lifeless body to Lyra

dialogue.text: We have to fall back, Kaelen! His sacrifice... it was meant to buy us a retreat, not a suicide.

beats.action: Lyra steps forward, gesturing urgently with her hand on the hilt of her sword.

dialogue.text: Stand up and draw your steel!

beats.action: Kaelen kneels in the dirt, his fingers tracing the faint, glowing runes near Valerius's body.
beats.camera: close-up, tilting down from Kaelen's face to his tracing fingers

dialogue.text: He didn't die for a retreat, Lyra. He died to show me the frequency of the lock.

beats.action: Kaelen looks up, his eyes sharp and calculating as he processes the mathematical truth.

dialogue.text: The agent's power is not a solid wall; it is a system of pressure. To break it, I do not need more force. I need to balance the equation.

beats.action: Lyra points with her sword toward the canyon walls where dark, oily corruption is visibly crawling down.
beats.camera: medium wide, showing Lyra with the corrupted gorge walls in the background

dialogue.text: By doing what? Look at the sky—the corruption is crawling down the rock walls! We must purify it, or we die with our swords in our hands!

beats.action: Kaelen stands up, turning his back on Lyra and walking toward a bubbling black fissure nearby.

dialogue.text: Purification is a slow, inefficient lie. To stop a flood, you do not build a dam of paper vows. You open the sluice gates.

beats.action: Kaelen plunges his bare hands directly into the bubbling, black pool of corruption. The liquid immediately begins to hiss and crawl up his skin.
beats.camera: extreme close-up of Kaelen's hands entering the black liquid

beats.action: Lyra recoils in shock, taking a step back as she watches Kaelen's self-destructive action.

dialogue.text: No! Stop! It will eat your soul, Kaelen! That is the very filth we swore to destroy! There is no honor in becoming the monster!

beats.action: Kaelen looks back over his shoulder, his face strained as the corruption climbs higher up his arms.
beats.camera: close-up, focusing on Kaelen's hardening gaze

dialogue.text: Honor is a luxury reserved for those who survive to write the histories. I choose to write.

beats.action: Kaelen pulls the corruption deep into his body. His veins turn pitch black, spreading like cracked glass across his neck and face as he gasps.
beats.camera: medium close-up, tracking the spread of the black veins

beats.action: Lyra lowers her sword slightly, staring at Kaelen with pure disgust and heartbreak.

dialogue.text: You... you are disgusting. You have thrown away everything he died for.

beats.action: A massive shockwave of dark energy erupts from Kaelen, instantly shattering the approaching tendrils of corruption in a deafening blast.
beats.camera: extreme wide shot, the shockwave clearing the gorge

beats.action: Kaelen stands tall amid the settling dust, his eyes completely void of warmth, staring ahead with his new, terrifying power.
beats.camera: medium close-up, slow push in on Kaelen's dark-veined face
